_meta.description: Complete enemy catalog for Samurai Usagi. 200+ enemies across 9 books + final. Every book has 15-25 regular enemies, 2-4 mini-bosses, 1-2 bosses. Most enemies are MATERIAL — humans, beasts, environmental hazards. demon_form is an optional overlay visible only at higher holiness phases.
_meta.design_philosophy: The game is 80% regular combat. Soldiers, wolves, bandits, archers, priests gone wrong, beasts of every era. Usagi FIGHTS. The spiritual layer is a reward for holiness, not a replacement for action.

tier_system.tier_1: Fodder — early area, 1-2 hits to kill. XP: low.
tier_system.tier_2: Standard — mid area, requires strategy. XP: medium.
tier_system.tier_3: Elite — late area, dangerous in groups. XP: high.
tier_system.mini_boss: Named enemy with unique abilities. Guardrails an area or quest.
tier_system.sub_boss: Demon lieutenant. Visible at Phase 2+. Major fight.
tier_system.accuser: The Accuser in era-specific form. Unique per book.

book-00.enemy_theme: Tokugawa soldiers enforcing the ban on Christianity. Mountain wildlife. Fire hazards.

enemies.name: Rice Paddy Rat
enemies.description: Fat on stolen rice. Bites harder than expected.

enemies.name: Wild Boar
enemies.description: Tusks like chipped knives. Charges in straight lines.

enemies.name: Pit Viper
enemies.description: Small, fast, venomous. Hides in the grass.

enemies.name: Mountain Wolf
enemies.description: Japanese grey wolf. Hunts in pairs. Howl calls reinforcements.

enemies.name: Black Bear
enemies.description: Cornered near the mountain pass. More scared than angry. Still deadly.

enemies.name: Ashigaru Recruit
enemies.description: A farmer in armor, just like you. He doesn't want to be here either.

demon_form.name: Imp of Obedience
demon_form.whisper: Orders are orders.

enemies.name: Ashigaru Spearman
enemies.description: Trained. Disciplined. The spear gives him reach you don't have.

demon_form.name: Imp of Wrath
demon_form.whisper: They killed your family. Make them pay.

enemies.name: Ashigaru Archer
enemies.description: Fires from the back rank. Accurate. Patient.

enemies.name: Patrol Scout
enemies.description: Light armor, fast feet. His job is to find you and scream for help.

enemies.name: Samurai Enforcer
enemies.description: Real samurai. Real training. Real danger. He has killed Christians before.

demon_form.name: Imp of Pride
demon_form.whisper: You are nothing. A peasant with a sickle.

enemies.name: Rōnin Bounty Hunter
enemies.description: Masterless samurai paid to hunt Christians. Fast, ruthless, motivated by gold.

enemies.name: Burning Debris
enemies.description: The chapel is burning. Dodge the falling timbers.

enemies.name: Choking Smoke
enemies.description: Can't fight smoke. Can only endure it.

enemies.name: Village Bully
enemies.description: Not a soldier — just a man who likes hurting people weaker than him. The ban gave him permission.

enemies.name: Kirishitan Informer
enemies.description: A Christian who broke. He leads soldiers to hidden chapels for silver. He can't meet your eyes.

demon_form.name: Shade of Despair
demon_form.whisper: It's easier this way.

enemies.name: Whisper of Doubt
enemies.description: Not a creature. A voice. It asks questions that have no good answers. 'Where is God now?'

enemies.name: Shade of Grief
enemies.description: The grief of the persecuted given form. It doesn't want to hurt you. It IS hurt.

enemies.name: Captain Hideki
enemies.description: He burns the chapel because he was ordered to. He hates it. You can see it in his face. But orders are orders.

demon_form.name: Chain of Obedience
demon_form.whisper: Duty is its own prison.

enemies.name: Commander Mori
enemies.description: The man who ordered the persecution. Calm, professional, devout in his own way. He believes he is saving Japan from a foreign disease.

enemies.name: The Despair
enemies.description: Appears after Obaa-chan's scene. The crushing weight of 'What was the point?'

enemies.name: The Accuser
enemies.description: 8-turn survival. You cannot kill him. You can only endure.

book-01.enemy_theme: Roman soldiers, arena beasts, underworld criminals, Gnostic cultists, and the Great Fire's chaos.

enemies.name: Sewer Rat
enemies.description: Plague carrier. The catacombs are full of them.

enemies.name: Feral Dog
enemies.description: Abandoned during the fire. Hungry, scarred, territorial.

enemies.name: Street Thief
enemies.description: The fire created orphans. Orphans became thieves.

enemies.name: Roman Legionary
enemies.description: The backbone of Rome. Disciplined, armored, relentless. His shield is his best weapon.

demon_form.name: Imp of Empire
demon_form.whisper: Rome is eternal. Your God is not.

enemies.name: Praetorian Guard
enemies.description: The emperor's personal guard. The best soldiers in the empire. They don't ask questions.

enemies.name: Roman Sagittarius
enemies.description: Auxiliary archer. Fires from behind the shield wall.

enemies.name: Roman Centurion
enemies.description: Officer commanding 80 men. The vine staff is his badge. He uses it on soldiers and prisoners alike.

enemies.name: Arena Gladiator
enemies.description: Retiarius — net and trident. He fights for survival, not conviction. The crowd is his real judge.

enemies.name: Murmillo
enemies.description: Heavy gladiator. Helmet, heavy shield, short sword. Slow but nearly impossible to put down.

enemies.name: Arena Lion
enemies.description: Starved for the games. It has no malice. Only hunger.

enemies.name: Arena Lions (Pack)
enemies.description: Three lions released at once. The crowd cheers.

enemies.name: Catacomb Thug
enemies.description: Not a soldier — a criminal who hides in the catacombs. Robs the living and the dead.

enemies.name: Gnostic Acolyte
enemies.description: Follows Demas's teachings. Believes the body is a prison and the spirit is all that matters. Uses spiritual attacks.

demon_form.name: Imp of Heresy
demon_form.whisper: The truth they won't tell you.

enemies.name: Gnostic Hierophant
enemies.description: High priest of the Gnostic sect. Claims secret knowledge. His 'miracles' are convincing counterfeits.

enemies.name: Spirit of the Great Fire
enemies.description: The Great Fire of Rome given malicious form. Nero blamed the Christians. The fire doesn't care who started it.

enemies.name: Imperial Spy
enemies.description: Pretends to be a Christian to infiltrate the catacombs. If he escapes, reinforcements arrive.

enemies.name: Nero's Animated Bust
enemies.description: A marble bust of Nero, animated by spiritual corruption. Idolatry made literal.

enemies.name: Centurion Marcus
enemies.description: A good man in a bad uniform. He can be reasoned with — if you can survive long enough to talk.

enemies.name: Titus the Undefeated
enemies.description: 200 kills in the arena. He has never lost. He will lose today — or you will die.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Senator Petronius)
enemies.description: 'One pinch of incense. Is your God so fragile He can't survive a pinch of incense?'

book-02.enemy_theme: Arian soldiers, desert predators, corrupted monks, sandstorms, and demonic temptations in the wilderness.

enemies.name: Desert Scorpion
enemies.description: Palm-sized. Tail like a whip. The desert is full of them.

enemies.name: Horned Viper
enemies.description: Buries itself in sand. Strikes before you see it.

enemies.name: Desert Hyena
enemies.description: Laughing in the dark. They follow wounded travelers.

enemies.name: Nile Crocodile
enemies.description: Ancient, patient, armored. The Nile has fed them for millennia.

enemies.name: Arian Soldier
enemies.description: Soldiers loyal to the Arian bishop. They think they're defending orthodoxy.

demon_form.name: Imp of Heresy
demon_form.whisper: It's just one word. Homoousios, homoiousios. What's the difference?

enemies.name: Arian Captain
enemies.description: Believes Athanasius is the heretic. Believes HE is the orthodox one.

enemies.name: Desert Bandit
enemies.description: Preys on travelers between Alexandria and the desert monasteries.

enemies.name: Bandit Chieftain
enemies.description: Rules a band of thirty. Claims the desert as his kingdom.

enemies.name: Corrupted Hermit
enemies.description: Went into the desert seeking God. Found something else. His eyes are wrong.

demon_form.name: Shade of Despair
demon_form.whisper: God never answered. He never will.

enemies.name: Sandstorm
enemies.description: The desert itself fights you. Sand strips skin and blinds eyes.

enemies.name: Temple Guard
enemies.description: Guards the old pagan temples. Some serve the Arians now.

enemies.name: Saharan Lion
enemies.description: Larger than the arena lions. Wild, free, and territorial.

enemies.name: Arian Inquisitor
enemies.description: Hunts Nicene Christians with theological arguments and soldiers.

demon_form.name: Azazel Fragment
demon_form.whisper: Truth is what the powerful decide.

enemies.name: Tomb Guardian
enemies.description: Ancient Egyptian burial guardian. Not truly alive. Not truly dead.

enemies.name: Bishop Secundus (Arian)
enemies.description: Arian bishop who believes he's right. His faith is sincere. His theology is wrong. Both things are true.

enemies.name: Temptation of Anthony
enemies.description: The desert temptation that Anthony the Great faced. It offers everything you want — and takes everything you are.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Bishop Form)
enemies.description: 'Homoousios, homoiousios. One letter. You'd die for one letter?'

book-03.enemy_theme: Mamluk soldiers, siege warfare, Crusader-on-Crusader violence, war beasts.

enemies.name: Mamluk Infantry
enemies.description: Elite slave-soldier. Trained from childhood. Fights with terrifying discipline.

enemies.name: Mamluk Archer
enemies.description: Horse bow on foot. Rapid fire. Devastating accuracy.

enemies.name: Mamluk Horseman
enemies.description: On horseback, he is a thunderbolt. Charge damage is devastating.

enemies.name: Siege Engineer
enemies.description: Builds and maintains the siege engines. Throws Greek fire.

enemies.name: Crusader Deserter
enemies.description: Fled the walls. Now fights anyone who reminds him of his shame.

demon_form.name: Imp of Fear
demon_form.whisper: Run. The walls will fall.

enemies.name: Reynald's Butcher
enemies.description: One of Reynald's men. Kills prisoners for sport. The cross on his surcoat is soaked in blood.

demon_form.name: Imp of Wrath
demon_form.whisper: God WILLS it. Kill them all.

enemies.name: Siege War Dog
enemies.description: Trained to attack on command. Armored in leather and iron studs.

enemies.name: Tower Defender
enemies.description: Behind the battlements, pouring boiling oil and dropping stones.

enemies.name: Hashashin
enemies.description: The legendary assassins. Fast as thought, invisible until the blade is in you.

enemies.name: Falling Rubble
enemies.description: The walls are coming down.

enemies.name: Greek Fire
enemies.description: Burns on water. Burns on stone. Burns on everything.

enemies.name: Templar Fanatic
enemies.description: A Templar who has lost his mind to the siege. Fights Christians and Muslims alike. 'God will sort them out.'

demon_form.name: War Demon Fragment
demon_form.whisper: God is on YOUR side. Kill for Him.

enemies.name: Sir Reynald the Butcher
enemies.description: A Crusader knight who has become the very thing the Cross opposes. His armor bears the Cross. His hands bear the blood of innocents.

enemies.name: Sultan's Champion
enemies.description: The finest warrior in the Mamluk army. He fights with honor. An actual honor duel is possible.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Chaplain)
enemies.description: 'God is on YOUR side. Pick up the sword. Kill for Him. Isn't that what the Cross means?'

book-04.enemy_theme: Mongol warriors (the finest army in history), Polish defenders, steppe beasts, spiritual acedia.

enemies.name: Mongol Scout
enemies.description: Light rider with a composite bow. Hits and runs. The Mongol way.

enemies.name: Mongol Heavy Lancer
enemies.description: Armored in lamellar. The charge shatters formations.

enemies.name: Mongol Horse Archer
enemies.description: Can fire three arrows in the time it takes to draw one. From a galloping horse. This is not fair.

enemies.name: Mongol Siege Master
enemies.description: Chinese and Persian engineers enslaved by the Mongols. Their weapons are centuries ahead.

enemies.name: Mongol Champion
enemies.description: A warrior with 10,000 kills. Not an exaggeration. He has counted.

enemies.name: Steppe Wolf
enemies.description: Follows the Mongol army, feeding on the dead.

enemies.name: Riderless War Horse
enemies.description: Its rider is dead. The horse is still fighting.

enemies.name: Polish Man-at-Arms
enemies.description: He knows they will lose. He fights anyway. Some of them are your allies. In the chaos, it's hard to tell.

enemies.name: Teutonic Knight
enemies.description: Black cross on white. The heaviest cavalry in Europe. They arrived too late and they know it.

enemies.name: Battlefield Shade
enemies.description: The dead who haven't left yet. Polish, Mongol, it doesn't matter. Death makes everyone equal.

enemies.name: Killing Frost
enemies.description: The Polish winter. It kills more than swords.

enemies.name: Baidar Khan
enemies.description: Grandson of Genghis Khan. Brilliant tactician. He doesn't hate you. He doesn't think about you at all. You are terrain.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Empty Sky)
enemies.description: He doesn't appear as a person. He appears as... nothing. The sky is empty. No angels. No God. Just silence. 'Where is He? You called. He didn't come.'

book-05.enemy_theme: Tokugawa enforcement (upgraded from Book 0), inquisitors, betrayers, and the Shimabara Rebellion.

enemies.name: Tokugawa Ashigaru
enemies.description: Better trained than their predecessors. The persecution has had 30 years to professionalize.

enemies.name: Tokugawa Musketeer
enemies.description: Tanegashima musket. One shot kills. Then he reloads for three turns. Time your rush.

enemies.name: Samurai Inquisitor
enemies.description: Specialist in finding hidden Christians. He knows the signs — the hidden crosses, the Orasho prayers, the coded fish symbols.

demon_form.name: Persecution Spirit
demon_form.whisper: Stamp on it. Just stamp on it. It's only wood.

enemies.name: Informant Neighbor
enemies.description: Your neighbor. Reported the hidden chapel for reward money. He won't meet your eyes.

enemies.name: Castle Samurai
enemies.description: Full armor, full training, full authority. The elite of Tokugawa's persecution force.

enemies.name: Shinobi
enemies.description: Hired to infiltrate the Kakure communities. Silent, deadly, invisible until the blade falls.

enemies.name: Apostate Christian
enemies.description: Stepped on the fumi-e. Broke. Now helps the inquisitors find others. The most dangerous and the most pitiful enemy.

demon_form.name: Shade of Despair
demon_form.whisper: It's too late for me. But I can make it easier for you.

enemies.name: Mountain Boar
enemies.description: Larger than Book 0. The mountains have fed them well.

enemies.name: Shimabara Rebel
enemies.description: Christian rebel. He fights for freedom. Some allies, some confused, some as dangerous as the enemy.

enemies.name: Rebel Rōnin
enemies.description: Masterless samurai who joined the rebellion. Skilled, desperate, and burning with a cause.

enemies.name: Grand Inquisitor Inoue
enemies.description: The most feared man in Japan. He doesn't kill Christians. He breaks them. His weapon is not the sword — it is the question: 'Will you watch this child step on the image? Or will you step yourself?'

enemies.name: The Accuser (Magistrate)
enemies.description: 'Step on the image and I'll let the child go. What kind of God would demand you watch a child suffer?'

book-06.enemy_theme: Ottoman naval forces, pirates, sea beasts, and the divided Church's internal conflict.

enemies.name: Janissary
enemies.description: The elite of the Ottoman army. Christian-born, converted, trained to perfection.

enemies.name: Ottoman Sailor
enemies.description: Fights on the galley deck with cutlass and grappling hook.

enemies.name: Ottoman Sipahi Archer
enemies.description: Cavalry archer fighting dismounted on galley decks.

enemies.name: Barbary Corsair
enemies.description: North African pirate. Fights dirty, fights fast, fights for gold.

enemies.name: Freed Galley Slave
enemies.description: Christian slave freed when a galley was captured. Fights with broken chains. Ally or enemy depending on context.

enemies.name: Mediterranean Sea Serpent
enemies.description: Something massive under the ships. Drawn by the blood in the water.

enemies.name: Greek Fire Operator
enemies.description: Operates the flame weapon. One hit ignites everything.

enemies.name: Protestant Mercenary
enemies.description: Fights for the Holy League's money, not its faith. Distrusts Catholics. May turn on you in certain conditions.

demon_form.name: Spirit of Division
demon_form.whisper: You worship the same God differently. That's enough to kill over, isn't it?

enemies.name: Ottoman Sipahi Champion
enemies.description: An elite cavalryman. Fights with genuine honor. A worthy opponent.

enemies.name: Drowning Tide
enemies.description: The sea itself. Cold, dark, pulling you down.

enemies.name: Ali Pasha (Ottoman Admiral)
enemies.description: Commander of the Ottoman fleet. Fights personally when his galley is boarded. A brave man on the wrong side of the battle.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Division)
enemies.description: Appears as the schism itself — half Catholic, half Protestant, speaking with both voices. 'You can't even agree on how to worship. And you think you can defeat ME?'

book-07.enemy_theme: Revolutionary soldiers, the mob, Enlightenment ideologues, the guillotine as enemy.

enemies.name: Sans-Culotte
enemies.description: Revolutionary street fighter. Fights in mobs. Individually weak, collectively terrifying.

enemies.name: National Guardsman
enemies.description: The revolution's army. Uniformed, disciplined, convinced they are liberating France.

enemies.name: Jacobin Agent
enemies.description: Political operative. His weapon is the accusation. One word from him and the guillotine awaits.

demon_form.name: Imp of Pride
demon_form.whisper: Man is his own salvation. God is dead.

enemies.name: Revolutionary Mob
enemies.description: Thirty people screaming for blood. Not an army. Worse than an army.

enemies.name: Revolutionary Tribunal Judge
enemies.description: Tries you in a courtroom. His weapon is the law — rewritten to make faith a crime.

enemies.name: The Executioner
enemies.description: He does not hate you. He does not enjoy this. He pulls the lever because someone must. That makes it worse.

demon_form.name: Spirit of the Machine
demon_form.whisper: Progress requires sacrifice. You are the sacrifice.

enemies.name: Church Vandal
enemies.description: Smashing statues of saints. Turning churches into 'Temples of Reason.' He thinks he's freeing people.

enemies.name: Constitutional Priest
enemies.description: A priest who swore loyalty to the Revolution over Rome. His sacraments are technically valid. That makes it complicated.

enemies.name: Priest of Reason
enemies.description: Worships Reason itself. Performs mock-sacraments in desecrated churches. Sincerely believes he is freeing humanity from superstition.

demon_form.name: Reason Idol
demon_form.whisper: Man needs no God. Man IS God.

enemies.name: Paris Sewer Rats
enemies.description: The sewers under Paris are how you travel unseen. The rats disagree.

enemies.name: The Incorruptible (Shadow)
enemies.description: Not Robespierre himself — his shadow. The idea that virtue can be enforced by the blade. That terror IS virtue.

demon_form.name: Moloch Fragment
demon_form.whisper: Sacrifice the few to save the many. It's mathematics. It's mercy.

enemies.name: The Accuser (Citizen Danton)
enemies.description: 'Man is his own salvation. You are a relic. A museum piece. History has moved past your God.'

book-08.enemy_theme: Nazi soldiers, camp guards, kapos, starvation, despair, and the most terrible enemy: silence.

enemies.name: Wehrmacht Soldier
enemies.description: Regular army. Some are conscripts. Some believe. Most try not to think about it.

enemies.name: SS Guard
enemies.description: The death's head. He chose this assignment. He volunteered.

demon_form.name: Imp of Cruelty
demon_form.whisper: They are not human. Therefore it is not murder.

enemies.name: Kapo
enemies.description: Prisoner turned enforcer. He beats his own people to survive one more day. The most tragic enemy in the game.

demon_form.name: Shade of Despair
demon_form.whisper: Survival is the only morality left.

enemies.name: Guard Dog
enemies.description: German Shepherd trained to attack prisoners. It doesn't know what it's doing. That doesn't make the teeth less sharp.

enemies.name: Starvation
enemies.description: Not an enemy you can fight. An enemy you endure. Stats drain every turn. Prayer slows the drain.

enemies.name: Polish Winter
enemies.description: The cold kills as efficiently as the guards.

enemies.name: Propaganda Officer
enemies.description: His weapon is the camera and the typewriter. He makes the unthinkable seem reasonable.

enemies.name: Camp Doctor
enemies.description: He decides who lives and who dies with a wave of his hand. Left or right. His face shows nothing.

demon_form.name: Death Angel (Corrupted)
demon_form.whisper: This is science. This is progress. This is the future of the human race.

enemies.name: Broken Resistance Fighter
enemies.description: Captured, tortured, turned. Now leads the guards to resistance cells. He weeps while he does it.

enemies.name: The Silence
enemies.description: Not a demon. Not the Accuser. Just... silence. The absence of an answer to the question 'Why?' It is the most powerful spiritual enemy in the game because it requires no lies. It only requires silence.

enemies.name: Camp Commandant
enemies.description: He runs the camp like a factory. Efficient. Organized. He goes home to his family every evening. He plays with his children. This is the banality of evil.

enemies.name: The Accuser (The Silence)
enemies.description: He doesn't argue. He doesn't tempt. He just... shows you the camp. And asks: 'Explain this. Explain this and keep your faith. I'll wait.'

final_book.enemy_theme: All previous demon types return. The Accuser's full army. Spiritual warfare at maximum intensity.

enemies.name: Spirit of Apathy
enemies.description: The modern demon. Not hatred. Not persecution. Just... indifference. 'Religion? Whatever. I'm busy.'

enemies.name: Digital Legion
enemies.description: Legion adapted. Instead of possessing one person, it possesses a million screens.

enemies.name: Echo of the Ashigaru
enemies.description: Ghosts of Book 0 enemies. They remember you. If you showed mercy, they bow. If you didn't, they attack.

enemies.name: Echo of the Legionary
enemies.description: Ghost of Rome's soldiers. Two thousand years and still marching.

enemies.name: Echo of the Khan
enemies.description: Steppe riders from beyond death. They charge through time.

enemies.name: Greater Demon of Pride
enemies.description: The sin that started it all. Lucifer's sin. Pride that says 'I will not serve.'

enemies.name: Greater Demon of Despair
enemies.description: The final temptation. Not to do evil — but to stop caring. To sit down. To give up. To die inside.

enemies.name: The Gauntlet
enemies.description: Every sub-boss from every book, one after another. Asmodeus. Azazel. Belial. All of them. The gauntlet before the throne.

enemies.name: Satan
enemies.description: The final battle. 4 phases. Every face he has ever worn. Then the angel of light. Then the adversary. Then the serpent. And against him — the Blessed Virgin Mary, Star of the Sea.

enemies.name: The Accuser (All Forms)
enemies.description: The final confrontation. He cycles through every form from every book. He recites every choice you made. Every step. Every refusal. And asks: 'What was the point?'
